Frequently Asked Questions

What is aibrowsr?

A single Rust binary for browser automation via Chrome DevTools Protocol. Built for AI agents, not humans.

How does it work?

It connects directly to Chrome via WebSocket and sends CDP commands. No Playwright, no Node.js, no daemon.

What about stealth mode?

Seven CDP-level patches bypass bot detection: navigator.webdriver, chrome.runtime, WebGL, User-Agent, Permissions API, input coordinates, and Runtime.enable skip.

Can I use it with my existing Chrome?

Yes! Use --connect to attach to any Chrome instance with remote debugging enabled. Essential for sites with heavy bot protection like DataDome.

Is it free?

Yes, MIT licensed. Open source on GitHub.
